creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/articles/freebsd-questions/#_before_submitting_a_question> includes direction to: 

<https://www.freebsd.org/mail>

– that redirects to: 

<https://docs.freebsd.org/mail/>

– without mentioning the primary list archives that are found through: 

<https://lists.freebsd.org/>

The primary archives should not be omitted. 

% grep -R "www.freebsd.org/mail" /usr/doc/documentation
% grep -R -i "www.freebsd.org/mail" /usr/doc/documentation
/usr/doc/documentation/content/es/articles/freebsd-questions/_index.adoc:* Busca y/o navega por los archivos de la lista de correo para ver si tu pregunta o una similar ha sido ya preguntada (y posiblemente respondida) en la lista. Puedes buscar y/o navegar los archivos de la lista en https://www.FreeBSD.org/mail[https://www.FreeBSD.org/mail] y https://www.FreeBSD.org/search/#mailinglists[https://www.FreeBSD.org/search/#mailinglists] respectivamente. También se puede hacer en otros sitios web, como por ejemplo http://marc.theaimsgroup.com[http://marc.theaimsgroup.com].
/usr/doc/documentation/content/es/articles/freebsd-questions/_index.po:"FreeBSD.org/mail[https://www.FreeBSD.org/mail] and https://www.FreeBSD.org/"
/usr/doc/documentation/content/es/articles/freebsd-questions/_index.po:"FreeBSD.org/mail[https://www.FreeBSD.org/mail] y https://www.FreeBSD.org/"
/usr/doc/documentation/content/zh-tw/articles/freebsd-questions/_index.adoc:* Browse and/or search the archives for the mailing list, to see if your question or a similar one has been asked (and possibly answered) on the list. You can browse and/or search the mailing list archives at http://www.FreeBSD.org/mail[http://www.FreeBSD.org/mail] and http://www.FreeBSD.org/search/#mailinglists[http://www.FreeBSD.org/search/#mailinglists] respectively. This can be done at other WWW sites as well, for example at http://marc.theaimsgroup.com[http://marc.theaimsgroup.com]. 
/usr/doc/documentation/content/en/articles/freebsd-questions/_index.adoc:* Browse and/or search the archives for the mailing list, to see if your question or a similar one has been asked (and possibly answered) on the list. You can browse and/or search the mailing list archives at https://www.FreeBSD.org/mail[https://www.FreeBSD.org/mail] and https://www.FreeBSD.org/search/#mailinglists[https://www.FreeBSD.org/search/#mailinglists] respectively. This can be done at other WWW sites as well, for example at http://marc.theaimsgroup.com[http://marc.theaimsgroup.com].
/usr/doc/documentation/content/el/articles/freebsd-questions/_index.adoc:* Περιηγηθείτε ή αναζητήστε σχετικά θέματα στα αρχεία της λίστας, για να δείτε αν η ερώτησή σας ή κάποια παρόμοια έχει ήδη εμφανιστεί ή έχει απαντηθεί στο παρελθόν. Μπορείτε να βρείτε τα αρχεία της λίστας στη διεύθυνση http://www.FreeBSD.org/mail[http://www.FreeBSD.org/mail] και να αναζητήσετε παλιά θέματα στη διεύθυνση http://www.FreeBSD.org/search/#mailinglists[http://www.FreeBSD.org/search/#mailinglists]. Τέτοιες αναζητήσεις μπορούν να γίνουν και σε άλλους εξυπηρετητές που έχουν το αρχείο της λίστας, π.χ. στη διεύθυνση http://marc.theaimsgroup.com[http://marc.theaimsgroup.com].
/usr/doc/documentation/content/ru/articles/freebsd-questions/_index.adoc:* Просмотрите и/или поищите в архивах списка рассылки, задавился ли ваш или схожий вопрос (и возможно отвечался) в списке. Вы можете просмотреть и/или поискать в архивах списков рассылки на http://www.FreeBSD.org/mail[http://www.FreeBSD.org/mail] и http://www.FreeBSD.org/search/#mailinglists[http://www.FreeBSD.org/search#mailinglists] соответственно. Это может быть сделано также и на других WWW сайтах, к примеру, на http://marc.theaimsgroup.com[http://marc.theaimsgroup.com]. 
/usr/doc/documentation/content/pt-br/articles/freebsd-questions/_index.adoc:* Procure e/ou pesquise nos arquivos da lista de discussão, para verificar se a sua pergunta ou uma pergunta semelhante já foi feita (e possivelmente respondida) antes na lista. Você pode navegar e/ou pesquisar os arquivos da lista de discussão em https://www.FreeBSD.org/mail[https://www.FreeBSD.org/mail] e https://www.FreeBSD.org/search/#mailinglists[https://www.FreeBSD.org/search/#mailinglists], respectivamente. Isso pode ser feito em outros sites da Web, como por exemplo, em http://marc.theaimsgroup.com[http://marc.theaimsgroup.com].
% 

----

Instead of aiming to list the multiple archives in multiple locations in multiple languages, a better place to raise awareness of the <https://docs.freebsd.org/mail/> alternative might be: 

<https://www.freebsd.org/community/mailinglists/>

– expand, enhance and habitually refer to that page. Ultimately less of a maintenance burden. 

Thanks
